All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

T

TARGET - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.ShootingMode
Target mode activated upon hitting a ship, focusing shots on adjacent cells.
TAXI_LINE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
High-visibility yellow paint color for taxiway guidelines and hazard markings.
toString() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Cell
Returns a string representation of the cell including coordinate and state.
toString() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Coordinate
Returns the formatted Battleship notation string (e.g., "A1", "C7").
tower() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Gradients
Creates a vertical linear gradient for superstructure towers and command bridges.
TOWER - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Standard color for bridge towers and command structures.
TOWER_DARK - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Dark shadow color for shaded tower sides and lower bridge recesses.
TOWER_LIGHT - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Highlighting tone for upper bridge decks and illuminated superstructure edges.
